question: Remote Access Trojan
canonical_answer: software program, typically malicious, that provides privileged, root-level (i.e., administrative) access to a computer while concealing its presence on that machine

appears_in.title: Cissp Flashcards Pdf
appears_in.answer: A Trojan horse with the express underlying purpose of controlling host from a distance

appears_in.title: Comptia Exam Objectives Security+
appears_in.answer: type of malware that allows covert surveillance, a backdoor for administrative control and unfettered and unauthorized remote access to a victim's machine.

appears_in.title: Comptia Sec Plus Objectives
